name: Country Chili
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces (1 cup) tomatoes, undrained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat margarine in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until tender.
3. Stir in salt, basil, chili powder, oregano, thyme, and pepper.
4. Add tomatoes and kidney beans; stir to combine.
5. Simmer, uncovered, for 10 to 15 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
